headline: Is Washington Building a Tariff Wall Around American AI?

headline: Alphabet Stock Falls as AI Spending Continues to Mount
summary: Alphabet  reported blowout earnings results late Wednesday, but the stock dropped after the search giant again raised its forecast for capital expenditures.  The Google-parent reported second-quarter adjusted earnings of $9.11 per share, well ahead of Wall Street’s consensus estimate for earnings of $2.88 per share, according to FactSet.  Alphabet said the results included $6.26 a share in gains on the fair value of its equity securities.

content.title: Alphabet Stock Falls as AI Spending Continues to Mount
content.summary: Alphabet  reported blowout earnings results late Wednesday, but the stock dropped after the search giant again raised its forecast for capital expenditures.  The Google-parent reported second-quarter adjusted earnings of $9.11 per share, well ahead of Wall Street’s consensus estimate for earnings of $2.88 per share, according to FactSet.  Alphabet said the results included $6.26 a share in gains on the fair value of its equity securities.
